title: pinguicula grandiflora subsp. longifolia
intro: Pinguicula grandiflora subsp. longifolia is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the family Lentibulariaceae, commonly known as the butterwort. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pinguicula grandiflora subsp. longifolia include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in some folk remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
